title: repo-tools (rt) CLI Roadmap
description: Multi-phase roadmap for rt CLI: command restructure + tree migration, worktree-context extension integration, and daemon-powered features (status dashboard, port discovery, notifications).

phases.name: Command Restructure
outputs: Cleaned cli.ts tree with settings and port branch nodes

context_snapshot.top_level_nodes: x, branch, build, hooks, port, doctor, open, cd, code, daemon, settings

phases.notes: All 5 steps completed with incremental commits. Also cleaned up type-check references in x.ts and setup-keys references in branch.ts. setupSecrets removed from lib/linear.ts.

phases.name: Leaf Command Migration
outputs: All command files export named handler functions
cli.ts tree is the sole source of truth for command structure

context_snapshot.fn_strategy: all leaf nodes use explicit fn in cli.ts
context_snapshot.migrated_commands: x, build-select, hooks, cd, code, doctor, port

phases.notes: All 5 steps completed. Also migrated port.ts which was missed in Phase 0 (still had run() export). Hooks command had requiresRepo removed since it manages its own repo-level identity picker. Console.clear() calls in x.ts and branch.ts were kept — they're internal wizard preview refreshes, not boilerplate entry clears. requireIdentity() calls in build-select.ts, settings.ts, and x.ts were kept — those commands manage their own identity resolution and don't have requiresRepo in the tree.

phases.name: Worktree Context Extension Integration
outputs: Extension uses daemon HTTP API instead of direct Linear/GitLab calls
phases.notes: Completed in a separate session (conversation 3529bd86). Extension migrated into monorepo, refactored to use daemon HTTP API for cached branch/ticket data.

phases.name: Daemon Port Discovery
outputs: Daemon cache includes port scan data refreshed every cycle
rt port command uses daemon data for instant, zero-config display

context_snapshot.features: IPv6 support, app bundle filtering, PID-level caching, zero-config discovery

phases.notes: Completed across two sessions. Implemented scanListeningPorts in shared lib/port-scanner.ts, daemon /ports endpoint with 30s refresh, CLI port command with daemon-first architecture, IPv6 parsing fix, macOS .app bundle process filtering, and fzf UI cleanup (border-label, deduplicated display).

phases.name: Status Dashboard & Notifications
outputs: commands/status.ts with dashboard and watch mode
